title: Basic JavaScript Progressive Web Apps
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Progressive Web Apps. Focus on implementing Web app manifest correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Progressive Web Apps
description: Create a function that uses Web app manifest and Service Worker registration together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Progressive Web Apps Project
description: Build a small application that applies Web app manifest, Service Worker registration, Offline caching strategies in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Progressive Web Apps
description: The following code has bugs related to Web app manifest. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Progressive Web Apps
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Web app manifest and Service Worker registration.
